name: galaxyos
description: GalaxyOS 认知增强引擎 — JiuwenSwarm 认知增强 Extension + 液态神经记忆 + R-CCAM 认知循环 + 技能自演化 + 17 层认知架构

commands.name: install-skills
commands.description: Install mattpocock/skills + GalaxyOS skills to workspace

commands.name: kernel-status
commands.description: Check GalaxyOS Python kernel and cognitive engine status

commands.name: memory-status
commands.description: Check liquid neural memory and DAG context status

commands.name: cognitive-panel
commands.description: Toggle GalaxyOS cognitive panel in Chat view

tools.name: galaxy_pool
tools.description: GalaxyPool 全系统运行状态查询

tools.name: claw_rccam_progress
tools.description: R-CCAM 认知循环实时进度查询

tools.name: claw_recall
tools.description: 深度语义记忆检索（CRAG + GraphRAG + RAPTOR + Self-RAG + 液态神经记忆）

tools.name: claw_lobster
tools.description: Lobster 管道执行

tools.name: claw_health
tools.description: 系统健康检查（17 层架构 + Worker Tier + 记忆系统 + R-CCAM + Agent 运行时状态）

tools.name: claw_vector_info
tools.description: 向量计算能力查询

tools.name: claw_events
tools.description: 事件日志查询（基于 TKG 时序知识图谱）

tools.name: claw_store
tools.description: 记忆存储（液态神经记忆 + DAG 上下文 + agent-core 上下文双写）

tools.name: claw_verify
tools.description: 幻觉验证（10 重交叉验证 + 多源证据）

tools.name: claw_rccam
tools.description: R-CCAM 认知循环（Retrieval→Cognition→Control→Action→Memory）

tools.name: claw_save_memory
tools.description: 记忆持久化（记忆巩固 + 艾宾浩斯遗忘曲线）

tools.name: claw_compile_skill
tools.description: Skill 编译（SkVM + COSPLAY 技能自演化）

tools.name: claw_asset_search
tools.description: KnowledgeAsset 搜索（MemGAS-SkVM 融合系统）

tools.name: claw_asset_register
tools.description: KnowledgeAsset 注册

tools.name: claw_node_invoke
tools.description: Node 外设调用（拍照/定位/录屏/健康数据）

tools.name: skill_execute
tools.description: 技能执行（经 AgentCoreBridge 路由到 ReActAgent/WorkflowAgent）

tools.name: skill_install
tools.description: 技能安装（source + scope + workspace_id）

tools.name: skill_discover
tools.description: 技能发现（invocation_type + query + workspace_id）

tools.name: skill_compile
tools.description: 技能编译（skill_name + skill_content + workspace_id）

tools.name: llm_call
tools.description: LLM 调用（经 GalaxyOS LLM Router 直接路由）

tools.name: tokui_render
tools.description: TokUI 结构化 UI 渲染（生成 DSL + SSE 流式推送到前端）

kernel.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter path for GalaxyOS cognitive engine kernel

kernel.mcpTransport.description: MCP transport protocol between JiuwenSwarm Gateway and GalaxyOS Python kernel

kernel.mcpHost.description: MCP server host (only for SSE/streamable_http transport)

kernel.mcpPort.description: MCP server port (only for SSE/streamable_http transport)

kernel.autoRestart.description: Auto-restart Python kernel on crash (exponential backoff, max 3 retries)

contextEngine.maxRecentMessages.description: Max recent messages to keep during context compression

contextEngine.recallOnAssemble.description: Enable memory recall during context assembly

contextEngine.dagEnabled.description: Enable DAG context management (SQLite + summary backtracking)

memory.dagEnabled.description: Enable DAG context for memory (time-decay + summary backtracking)

rccam.timeoutMs.description: R-CCAM cycle timeout in milliseconds (fallback to direct LLM on timeout)

routing.defaultModel.description: Default model for LLM routing via GalaxyOS LLM Router

security.injectionScanEnabled.description: Enable Skill Bank injection scanner (3-level risk detection)

security.channelIsolation.description: Enable channel-aware memory isolation (group chat = read-only)

tokui.enabled.description: Enable TokUI streaming rich UI rendering

tokui.autoRenderRCCAM.description: Auto-render R-CCAM cognitive state as TokUI panels

tokui.themeSync.description: Sync TokUI theme with desktop theme (CSS variables mapping)

tokui.maxChunkSize.description: Max DSL chunk size in bytes for SSE streaming

cognitivePanel.defaultOpen.description: Open cognitive panel by default in Chat view
